# Heavy Armors
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Heavy%20Armors&prop=wikitext

Heavy Armors are used by Melee Classes, like [[Warrior]], [https://rotfserver.wikia.com/wiki/Knight Knight] and [https://rotfserver.wikia.com/wiki/Paladin Paladin], In almost every occasion Heavy Armors give alot of Defense.

There are Heavy Armors Exclusive to Rotf, These are:
* [[The Drenched Armor]]
* [[Armor of Oryx]]
* [[Armor of the Fallen]]
* [[Armor of the Aquatic God]]
* [[Armor of the Demon Lord]]
* [[Ancient Stone Guardian Armor]]
* [[Thor's Armor]]
* [[pD Armor]]
* [[The Scavenger's Attire]]
* [[Odin's Attire]]
* [[Infinity Chestplate]]
